title: Codex identity plumbing follow-up plan
body: Owner asked that the remaining Codex-wide session-name follow-up not stay implicit. I am adding a future strategic plan for global Codex identity plumbing: thread identity rows, wrappers/start-right defaults, existing Codex/unknown cleanup, and any title/statusline or hook integration that can be verified later. This stays separate from the completed collaboration-state write-safety path, which already derives identity for safe state writes.
